_description: MSN hardware parameters calibrated to 35-device P0118MA dataset (All_Sample.json, Dec 2025).
_units: SI — F, Ohm, V, A, s
_Rm_hi_note: 60 kOhm is the effective off-state membrane resistance (thyristor anode-cathode off-state impedance). NOT the 680 kOhm gate-to-anode resistor.
_Vth_note: 2.0 V is the spike threshold on Vm. Approximately equal to Vout peak since Rm_lo~0. Dataset mean=1.73V, std=0.56V, range=[1.1, 2.8] V.
_I_hold_note: Thyristor holding current: minimum anode current to maintain conduction. Equals I_max (depol-block onset) because when I_in > I_hold the closed-state steady-state current never drops below I_hold. 77 uA is the median I_sat from 35 devices (range 56.8-109.5 uA).
